--- External gap / blockers for >=1e5 isolated evidence ---
1. CPU isolation: WSL2 hypervisor jitter; cpufreq/taskset often ineffective.
2. Upstream API: oreparaz/dudect is header-only (src/dudect.h); harnesses use DUDECT_IMPLEMENTATION.
3. Measurement budget: release evidence needs >=100000 traces per primitive on
   a pinned bare-metal or privileged VM core (see tools/dudect/Makefile default).
3. This script used DUDECT_MEASUREMENTS=5000 for a best-effort lab run only.
4. Archive t-statistic reports from harness stdout on isolated hardware for release.
